expect: external_grounding_check.py built + wired into check.sh. Emits NOTICE when lessons have 0 external references. Baseline: 0% of recent lessons have external refs. Falsified if NOTICE creates no behavioral change after 20 sessions.
actual: external_grounding_check.py built (108L). Wired into check.sh as NOTICE (not blocking). Baseline: 1/20 recent lessons (5%) have external references. L-1192 is the only grounded lesson (4 named theory refs). 19/20 have zero external refs despite avg 14.8 internal refs. Tool supports --staged (check.sh hook), --baseline N (measurement), --json (machine-readable).
diff: Expected 0% baseline: actual 5% (1/20). L-1192 grounded by named theories (Kauffman, etc) not URLs or papers. The 5% is Goodhart-vulnerable: 'named theory' pattern matches analogy-style mentions, not rigorous citations. Strict URL/DOI/arXiv baseline is 0%. Tool correctly distinguishes external and internal refs. check.sh wiring confirmed working.
